prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低录取位次分别为约8435名、7161名、6759名、7823名、7459名，整体呈波动走势。2021–2023年位次逐年前移（从8435升至6759），但2024年新高考改革后位次后移至7823名，2025年小幅回升至7459名，近两年波动区间在7459–7823之间，2025年基准位次约7459名；该校在甘肃省该科类招生计划：2021–2023年均为12人，2024年扩至23人，2025年增至25人；2026年计划大幅扩招至34人，较2025年增加9人，扩招幅度约36%，显著增加了招生名额，对录取位次产生明显的后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名约第28位（2026年），属于国内顶尖工科院校，盘锦校区共享主校办学层次与学科资源，对考生有较强吸引力；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号；抖音热度排名第55位（较热），短视频平台有一定曝光度，整体关注度中等偏上，但负面舆情可能使部分考生持观望态度；共享大连理工大学主校学科评估结果：化学工程与技术A+、机械工程A、力学A、土木工程A、工商管理A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A、环境科学与工程A-等，工科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有正向支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在甘肃招生专业以能源化学工程、生物科学类、海洋技术、经济学类等为主，其中化工、生物类属社会舆论中偏冷门方向（生化环材整体劝退），经济学类呈分化观望态势；甘肃省2026年物理类考生估算约14.4万人，较2025年增加约2.3万人（+18.9%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7459名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招36%、本省物理类考生增加约18.9%、学校声誉偏负面及专业热度偏冷等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年明显后移。预测最低位次约9170名，区间8670–9670名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 能源化学工程
- 生物科学类
- 智能海洋装备（2026年新增）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 海洋技术
- 生物信息学（2026年新增）
- 生物制造（2026年新增）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济学类（电子商务、经济学）
- 环境生态工程（2021-2023年招生，2024年后未出现）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间8670–9670名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<8670名）可重点冲刺一档的能源化学工程（A+学科）；位次接近区间上限（>9670名）建议以三档经济学类保底。注意2026年新增智能海洋装备、生物制造、生物信息学等专业，无历史位次参考，报考风险与机遇并存。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this subject category were approximately 8435, 7161, 6759, 7823, and 7459 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend. Rankings moved forward year by year from 2021 to 2023 (from 8435 to 6759), but after the 2024 new college entrance exam reform, rankings moved backward to 7823, then slightly recovered to 7459 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past two years is between 7459 and 7823, with the 2025 baseline ranking at approximately 7459. The university's enrollment plan for this category in Gansu Province: 12 students each year from 2021 to 2023, expanded to 23 in 2024, and increased to 25 in 2025. The 2026 plan significantly expands to 34 students, an increase of 9 students compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 36%, which notably increases enrollment slots and exerts significant downward pressure on admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 28th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking. It is a top domestic engineering university. The Panjin Campus shares the main campus's level and disciplinary resources, which strongly attracts candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving signals of admission cutoff anomalies or abnormal submission lines. Douyin popularity ranks 55th (relatively hot), with some exposure on short video platforms, overall attention is moderately high, but negative public opinion may lead some candidates to adopt a wait-and-see attitude. Sharing the main campus's discipline evaluation results: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, etc., with strong engineering strength, providing positive support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors in Gansu mainly include Energy Chemical Engineering, Biological Sciences, Marine Technology, and Economics. Among them, chemical and biological majors are relatively unpopular in public opinion (biochemistry, environmental science, materials, and chemical engineering are generally discouraged), while Economics shows a divided and wait-and-see trend. In 2026, the estimated number of physics category candidates in Gansu Province is about 144,000, an increase of about 23,000 compared to 2025 (+18.9%), and the expansion of the candidate pool intensifies competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7459, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of 36%, the 18.9% increase in local physics category candidates, the somewhat negative university reputation, and the relatively cold major popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9170, with a range of 8670 to 9670.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Energy Chemical Engineering
- Biological Sciences
- Intelligent Marine Equipment (new in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Marine Technology
- Bioinformatics (new in 2026)
- Biomanufacturing (new in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (E-commerce, Economics)
- Environmental Ecological Engineering (enrolled from 2021 to 2023, not appearing after 2024).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8670–9670, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<8670), focus on stretching for Tier 1's Energy Chemical Engineering (A+ discipline). If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>9670), it is recommended to use Tier 3's Economics as a safety. Note the new majors in 2026: Intelligent Marine Equipment, Biomanufacturing, and Bioinformatics, which have no historical ranking reference, so the risk and opportunity coexist.
